title: Combined Craftables
description: Combines all those singular (Craftable _____) mods into one place!
body:
# Aren't you tired of all of those one-off "Craftable _____" mods?
## Combined Craftables puts all of them in one place!

 - Saddle
  ![Saddle Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84422903e00b5e41d3a26097fb81484cef04970f.png)
 - Nametag
  ![Nametag Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b732f7c0532e099d0e05bf22c5dc5338726f470.png)
 - Trident
  ![Trident Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aba10bdb8150a43257c68af10551aa6641be669.png)
 - Chainmail Armor
      (Use all different shapes with the ingots to get the different armor pieces)
  ![Chainmail Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d7794c0744d27f3fc766cb1853d67c3f215b0aa.png)
 - Horse Armor
      (Use all different materials [Leather, Gold, Iron, and Diamond] in place of the Gold)
  ![Horse Armor Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c60f40a20b95395e0b01dd82073137654f00a76.png)
 - Cobweb
  ![Cobweb Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/363853fa6715143507186fef938040b0bf2cbfac.png)
 - Grass Block
      (Shapeless recipe)
  ![Grass Block Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3678261e2ecc1415503bf0c0c408749cfd18a0f9.png)
 - Bell
  ![Bell Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d9309c971aa42594b7883a6913d49b1676914c0.png)
